category_sources: Official Apache ORC API documentation lists org.apache.orc.tools classes for ORC file inspection and manipulation.
source_facts.description says orc-tools provides ORC Java command-line tools and utilities.

tags_sources: Official Apache ORC API documentation lists tools for ORC file structure, row counts, JSON dumps, scanning, and merging.
